---
title: "LMU Open Science Center"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
repo-actions: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1250px
      margin-width: 200px
      gutter-width: 2em
title-block-banner: "assets/img/osc_image_assets/Banner1.jpg"
# listing:
#   - id: news-carousel
#     template: news/news.ejs
#     contents: news/news
#     sort: "date desc"
#   - id: events-carousel
#     template: events/events.ejs
#     contents: events/events/*.qmd
#     sort: "date desc"
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/remove_title.js" defer></script>
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      <script src="assets/javascript/impact_counter.js" defer></script>
      <style>
      /* =============================================
         banner overlay
         ============================================= */
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
        background-position-y: center;
        height: 400px;
        position: relative;
        margin-bottom: 0;
        
      }
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(
          135deg,
          rgba(0,65,28,0.08) 0%,
          rgba(0,136,59,0.03) 60%,
          rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 100%
        );
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      /* =============================================
         shared style componet
         ============================================= */
         .osc-section {
            padding: 2rem 2rem 0;
          }

          .osc-section + .osc-section {
            margin-top: 2rem;
          }

          .osc-section-inner {
            max-width: 1200px !important;
            margin: 0 auto;
          }
          .section-mark {
            letter-spacing: 0.18em;
            color: #00883A;
          }
          .section-title {
            font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 1.7rem);
            margin: 0 0 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.3;
          }

      /* =============================================
         mission
         ============================================= */
          .mission-checklist {
            list-style: none;
          }
          .mission-checklist ul {
            padding-left: 0;
            margin-left: 0;
          }     
          .mission-checklist li {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.65rem;
            align-items: flex-start;
            font-size:0.95rem;
            color: #555;
            line-height: 1.7;
          }
          .mission-check-icon {
            width: 18px; 
            height: 18px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #f4f1f1;
            color: #00883A;
            font-size: 0.6rem;
          }
          .mission-statement-btn.btn.btn-primary {
            background: #00883A;
            color: white !important;
            border-color: #00883A;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,136,58,0.28);
          }
          .mission-statement-btn.btn.btn-primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,136,58,0.35);
          }

      /* =============================================
         newsletter section
         ============================================= */

         .newsletter-section {
          background: #00883A;
          border-radius: 20px;
          overflow: hidden;
        }

        .newsletter-btn.btn {
          transition: color 0.25s ease;       
          cursor: pointer;                        
        }

        .newsletter-btn.btn.btn-outline-light:hover{
          background: #ffffff50 !important;
          color: white !important;
          border: 1px solid white !important;
        }


      /* =============================================
         impact section
         ============================================= */
          .impact-container {
            background: #f7fcf7f2;
          }
          .impact-container .metric-value {
            font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
            font-size: 2.6rem;
            color: #00883A;
            line-height: 1;
          }
          .impact-container .metric-label {
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
          }
      /* =============================================
         testimonial
         ============================================= */

          .testimonial-inner blockquote {
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem);
            font-style: italic;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: #555;
            border-left: 1px solid #d5d3d394;
          }
          .testimonial-inner blockquote p{
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
           }
          .testimonial-inner strong {
            margin-left: 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: rgba(45, 44, 44, 0.64);
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-item {
            padding: 0.5rem;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .testimonial-inner blockquote p {
            line-height: 1.6;
            min-height: calc(1.6em * 5);
            max-height: calc(1.6em * 5);
            overflow: hidden;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 5;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-prev,
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-next {
            width: 2.5rem;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-prev-icon,
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-next-icon {
            filter: invert(38%) sepia(74%) saturate(1200%) hue-rotate(104deg) brightness(92%) contrast(101%);
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-indicators {
            margin-bottom: -1.5rem;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-indicators [data-bs-target] {
            background-color: #00883A;
          }
          .testimonial-image img {
              width: 110px;
              aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
              object-fit: cover;
              border-radius: 50%;
          }
      /* =============================================
         explore cards
         ============================================= */

         .explore-section .desc{
          max-width: 600px;
         }

        .explore-card {
          position: relative;
          transition: 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
          background: white;
        }

        .explore-card::after {
          content: "";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          width: 0;              
          height: 3px; 
          background-color: #00883A;
          border-radius: 12px;
          transition: width 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        .explore-card:hover::after {
          width: 100%;            
        }

        .explore-card:hover {
          box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
          transform: translateY(-3px);
        }
        .explore-card h5 {
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 400;
        }
        .explore-card p {
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.65;
        }
      </style>
      <link href="/assets/bootstrap-5.3.8-dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
css: /custom-navbar.css
---


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     MISSION + NEWSLETTER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}

::: {.row .align-items-center .gx-5 .no-side-padding}
::: {.col-lg-8}

# Our Mission {.mb-3 .fw-semibold}

### The researcher-led LMU Open Science Center (OSC) advances research excellence at LMU Munich by promoting open, responsible, and reproducible practices. {.mb-3 .section-title .text-muted}

::: {.mission-checklist .d-flex .flex-column .gap-1 .p-0 .my-4}
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Essential training in the highest standards of reproducible research methods
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Digital sovereignty and resilience to global challenges through open source workflows
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Transparency as foundation for trust and evidence-based societal debates
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Reliable scientific data as a critical foundation for responsible AI, digitalisation, and societal translation
:::

[Learn More About OSC](about/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .mission-statement-btn}

:::

::: {.col-lg-4}
::: {.newsletter-section .d-flex .flex-column .justify-content-center .text-center .p-5 .text-white .gap-1}

#### Stay updated with the OSC {.mb-3 .fw-semibold .text-white}

Sign up to our mailing list for the latest workshops, events, and resources.

[Subscribe](https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/lmu-osc){.btn .btn-outline-light .newsletter-btn}

:::
:::
:::

:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     accolades plus testimonial carousel
════════════════════════════════════════ -->

::: {.container .impact-container}
::: {.row .align-items-center}

::: {.col-lg-4}
::: {.row}

::: {.col-12 .text-center}
::: {.metric-value .mb-2 data-target="2000+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label .text-uppercase .text-muted}
Researchers Trained
:::
:::

::: {.col-6 .text-center}
::: {.metric-value .mb-2 data-target="150+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label .text-uppercase .text-muted}
Members
:::
:::

::: {.col-6 .text-center}
::: {.metric-value .mb-2 data-target="150+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label .text-uppercase .text-muted}
Publications
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-8}
::: {.testimonial-carousel}
```{=html}
<div id="testimonialCarousel" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="carousel" data-bs-interval=10000>
  <div class="carousel-inner">
    <div class="carousel-item active">
      <div class="row d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center">
        <div class="col-lg-11">
          <div class="testimonial-inner">
            <blockquote>
              <p>Our participation in the Switch to Open Program was highly valuable for our research group. Developing a tailored research practices handbook helped streamline workflows, strengthen reproducibility, and clarify expectations across the team.</p>
              <strong>- Prof. Dr. med. Inga Katharina Koerte, M.D.</strong>
            </blockquote>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="carousel-item">
      <div class="row d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center">
        <div class="col-lg-11">
          <div class="testimonial-inner">
            <blockquote>
              <p>I really enjoyed this summer school. The topics were well balanced, the tutorials were well organized, the lectures were interesting and broad, the tutors demonstrated know-how from a hands-on-perspective...
                Overall, <span style="white-space: nowrap;">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span>!"</p>
              <strong>- Summer School Participant</strong>
            </blockquote>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="carousel-item">
      <div class="row d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center">
        <div class="col-lg-11">
          <div class="testimonial-inner">
            <blockquote>
              <p>The LMU Open Science Center was extremely helpful for us to complete the section on Research Data Management in our Cluster of Excellence pre-proposal. In fact, without them we would have not been able to write this part in such a comprehensive manner as it was possible with their amazing support.</p>
              <strong>- Professor</strong>
            </blockquote>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="carousel-item">
      <div class="row d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center">
        <div class="col-lg-11">
          <div class="testimonial-inner">
            <blockquote>
              <p>I really enjoyed the instructor training. It was a great professional development opportunity that strengthened both my understanding of Open Science and teaching skills, giving me the confidence and tools to design and deliver my own workshops!</p>
              <strong>- Alberto G. Villagran, PhD Candidate</strong>
            </blockquote>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#testimonialCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
    <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
  </button>
</div>
```
:::
:::

:::
:::



<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     explore cards
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}
::: {.container .explore-section}


## What We Offer

[What we offer]{.text-uppercase .text-success .small .fw-semibold .mb-2 .section-mark}


::: {.text-muted .mb-4}
Whether you're a student, early-career researcher, or faculty — there's a place for you in the open science community.
:::

::: {.row .row-cols-1 .row-cols-md-2 .row-cols-lg-3 .g-4}

::: {.col}

<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
<div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 text-success rounded-3 d-inline-flex text-center align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3" style="width:50px;height:50px;">
<i class="bi bi-people fs-5"></i>
</div>
<h5 class="text-black mb-2">Our Community</h5>
<p class="text-muted flex-grow-1">Meet the researchers, advocates, and partners shaping open science at LMU and beyond.</p>
<a href="people/members.qmd" class="text-decoration-none stretched-link fw-semibold text-success small">
Meet the OSC Community →</a>
</div>
</div>

:::

::: {.col}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
<div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 text-success rounded-3 d-inline-flex text-center align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3" style="width:50px;height:50px;">
<i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark fs-5"></i>
</div>
<h5 class="text-black mb-2">Training & Workshops</h5>
<p class="text-muted flex-grow-1">Build hands-on skills in reproducible research through OSC workshops, summer schools, and tutorials.</p>
<a href="training/index.qmd" class="text-decoration-none stretched-link fw-semibold text-success small">Explore Training →</a>
</div>
</div>

:::

::: {.col}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
<div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 text-success rounded-3 d-inline-flex text-center align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3" style="width:50px;height:50px;">
<i class="bi bi-globe2 fs-5"></i>
</div>
<h5 class="text-black mb-2">Partners & Networks</h5>
<p class="text-muted flex-grow-1">Discover our institutional collaborators and the international networks we're part of.</p>
<a href="partners/institutional_members.qmd" class="text-decoration-none stretched-link fw-semibold text-success small">See OSC Partners →</a>
</div>
</div>

:::
:::

:::
:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     NEWS & EVENTS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}
::: {.container}


## Stay In the Loop

[Stay in the loop]{.text-uppercase .section-mark .small .fw-semibold .mb-2}


::: {.row}

::: {.col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="card h-100">
  <div class="card-header">
    News
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <!-- news carousel goes here -->
    <h5 class="card-title">Card title</h5>
    <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-body-secondary">Card subtitle</h6>
    <p class="card-text">Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card’s content.</p>
    <a href="#" class="btn btn-primary">Read More</a>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer text-center">
    <a href="news/index.qmd" class="btn btn-success btn-sm w-50">All News →</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="card h-100">
  <div class="card-header">
    Events
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <!-- events carousel goes here -->
    <h5 class="card-title">Card title</h5>
    <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-body-secondary">Card subtitle</h6>
    <p class="card-text">Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card’s content.</p>
    <a href="#" class="btn btn-primary">See Event</a>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer text-center">
    <a href="events/index.qmd" class="btn btn-success btn-sm w-50">All Events →</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

:::

:::
:::
